priorities.title: Multi-structure merge reach (MERGE_REACH_RADIUS + nearest-pick map)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) constants.ts adds MERGE_REACH_RADIUS=100, separate from controls.ts-local AUTO_BOND_RADIUS=60. (2) controls.ts:onUp passes allPrimitivesInRange(MERGE_REACH_RADIUS, spark.pos) as mergeCandidateIds; primary target picking still at AUTO_BOND_RADIUS. (3) world.ts placePrimitive merge sweep refactored to two-phase Map<rootId, {cand, distSq, comp}>: Phase 1 groups candidates by component picking nearest-to-new-prim per component; Phase 2 iterates one merge bond per chosen-nearest cand. Replaces S9's implicit 'first-iterated cand wins' (Council Gemini #2 adoption). (4) Tests: 7 new in session13.test.ts covering 3-structure merge at 90px, nearest-pick per component, separate-components 2-bond case. (5) Combined into commit 8e58cd2 with P3 (impulse-related changes share the same code path — thematic atom). (6) 208/208 tests passing post-P1+P3. Typecheck clean (npx tsc -b --noEmit exit 0).

priorities.title: STRUCTURE_GROW outward verlet impulse (primary-component centroid-outward)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) constants.ts adds STRUCTURE_GROW_IMPULSE=0.8 with cross-reference comment to MERGE_IMPULSE (Gemini #3 adoption). (2) world.ts: primaryPreExistingPrims snapshot inside primary-target block — collects componentOf(target).primitiveIds minus new prim. After STRUCTURE_GROW visual emit (cinematicsEnabled-gated), computes centroid of (primaryPreExisting + new prim) and applies prevPos -= unit(centroid → p) × IMPULSE on each pre-existing prim. NaN-safe via dmag<1 skip. (3) Direction adopted from Council Grok #2: centroid-outward (reads as 'grow') vs origin-outward (reads as 'recoil'). (4) Gated on cinematicsEnabled (paired with visual emit) — different from MERGE_IMPULSE's unconditional pattern; single mental model for C-keybind. (5) Tests: 6 new in session13.test.ts P2 block — sentinel constant, 2-prim primary (single anchor + new), 3-prim chain centroid math, anchor placement skip, cinematicsEnabled gate, cand-component prims excluded. (6) Existing session10 tests preserved (P3 inward on cand still asserts MERGE_IMPULSE_MAGNITUDE shift; P2 doesn't touch cand). (7) 214/214 tests passing. Typecheck clean. Commit 72caa22.

priorities.title: MERGE_IMPULSE_MAGNITUDE bump (1.2->3.0) + short-bond clamp
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) constants.ts: MERGE_IMPULSE_MAGNITUDE 1.2->3.0 (Council validated: 5% strain on 60-px bond, 5x headroom vs HIGH-tier 25% break; compression-only since bonds break on extension per physics/bonds.ts:58). (2) constants.ts: MIN_BOND_LENGTH_FOR_IMPULSE=25 added (Council Gemini #1 adoption — note: re-justified as teleport-prevention vs Gemini's strain-break framing which was wrong; bonds.ts breaks on extension only). (3) world.ts: short-bond clamp via shortBondScale = min(1, mergeBondRestLength / 25). Scale applied uniformly across cand component to preserve rigid-body translation (no internal-bond strain). Effective impulse at idist=10 -> 1.2px, preventing teleport-through-new-prim. (4) Bundled into commit 8e58cd2 with P1 since code path is shared (merge sweep). (5) Tests: 4 new in session13.test.ts P3 block — sentinel constants, full-magnitude no-clamp case, short-bond scaling formula. (6) Existing session10 test (line 284) still passes: imports MERGE_IMPULSE_MAGNITUDE so asserts on new 3.0 value automatically. (7) 208/208 tests pass after P1+P3 commit. Typecheck clean.

priorities.title: SCORE_TIER center pulse at new prim (remove corner, scale up, pos required)
priorities.check_method: PRIME-AUDIT (Rule 20): (1) effects.ts SCORE_TIER kind: added required pos: Vec2 (Council Grok #5 partial adoption — single pulse at placement, corner pulse removed). (2) world.ts emit-site: pos: { x: prim.pos.x, y: prim.pos.y } so renderer draws AT new primitive. (3) scoreTier.ts: rewritten as 44 LOC — CANVAS_HEIGHT import removed (no more corner anchor); SCORE_TIER_CENTER_X/Y constants removed; renders at effect.pos. Scale-up: bloom radius 28->60 (start) / 56->100 (end); ring radius 18->40 (start) / 68->100 (end); stroke width 2->3. (4) lifetime.ts: SCORE_TIER_DURATION_TICKS 30->48 (~500ms -> ~800ms for longer foveal-attention coverage). (5) effectsRenderer.test.ts: 3 SCORE_TIER fixture constructions updated for required pos field. (6) Tests: 2 new in session13.test.ts P4 block — pos co-location with new prim, multi-tier crossing pos-tagging. (7) HUD progress bar unchanged in ui.ts — still fills continuously as running indicator. (8) 216/216 tests pass. Typecheck clean. Commit 8b5ad3e.

priorities.title: Closeout (BACKLOG + reflexion + boot snapshot + PDR archive + HANDOFF)
priorities.check_method: Closeout artifacts complete: BACKLOG.md S13 entry inserted (~80 LOC with full P1-P5 narrative + Council adoption summary + carry-forward block + PRIME-AUDIT carry-forward note) + session map row added (S13 DONE -> S14+ Phase 2/Audio/charter-extraction). reflexion_log.md prepended with 5 S13 entries (#verify-council-claims-against-source-before-adoption, #knob-splitting-when-one-constant-doubles-as-two-semantic-concepts, #impulse-direction-as-ux-framing, #short-bond-clamp-prevents-teleport-not-strain-break, SESSION #per-priority-commit-vs-thematic-batching); pruned 3 oldest S4-S5 detail entries (S4 SESSION, S5 #single-action-place, S5 #headless-test-contamination) to maintain <=50 cap; pruning footer updated. boot-snapshot.md regenerated with S13 commit list + post-S13 state + § XV PRIME-AUDIT carry-forward note. PDR moved (mv since untracked) to .claude/plans-archive/2026-05-12_PDR_Session_13_COMPLETED.md with post-execution Battle Ledger + Council adoption follow-through table + PRIME-AUDIT delta appended. HANDOFF_2026-05-12.md written at root replacing S12's HANDOFF_2026-05-11.md; S12 root archived to .handoff-archive/HANDOFF_2026-05-11_S12_postS13.md via git mv. Final state: 216/216 tests pass. Typecheck clean. § XV carry-forward logged (world.ts at 587 LOC, 17% over soft charter; placePrimitive extraction recommended for S14 — not blocking). 4 work commits (8e58cd2 P1+P3, 72caa22 P2, 8b5ad3e P4) + this closeout commit (50f6ff9) on origin/master, all pushed.
